prompt:
Pet portrait photography (intended use).
Scene: a Japanese autumn park with soft warm afternoon light, fallen red maple leaves on the ground, golden trees in blurred bokeh background.
Subject: a Shiba Inu dog sitting, looking slightly off-camera with a gentle relaxed expression.
Key details: photorealistic; fine fur detail in honey-tan and white, alert triangular ears, warm brown eyes, mouth slightly open in a relaxed smile; shallow depth of field; eye-level composition; catch-light in the eyes.
Constraints: no other animals, no humans, no text, no watermark, no collar tags with writing.
